duplicate_modules.assessment: Overlapping advisory and signal-generation logic exists; new work should compose existing ai-insights and merchant-assistant paths instead of creating more public APIs.
Marketing automation and platform automation use separate rule stores; avoid cross-writing without explicit boundary handling.
Operational health endpoints exist in both lightweight and richer monitoring paths.

overlapping_logic: catalog deduplication and product similarity now span catalog, ai-insights, and intelligence layers
merchant advisory exists in modules/merchant-assistant and modules/ai-insights and should be extended through adapters
discovery ranking already exists in modules/discovery and should only be upgraded behind compatible service wrappers
legacy_code_paths: routes/settlement.routes.js and several legacy validators coexist with newer admin routes
tests live in both src/test and src/tests
some model files still contain commented legacy schema fragments
missing_integrations: new intelligence services are not yet mounted behind existing discovery, assistant, or dashboard controllers
search log persistence is not present, so trend detection currently requires injected search data
analytics layer is read-only but not yet scheduled through a dedicated worker
